raw.message: Come back to the fun 🌟 Spin now and WIN Massive Rewards! 🎁💰

hook.summary: An 'Apology Letter' scrolls down offering a massive coin reward.
hook.visual_action: A formal-looking letter titled 'APOLOGY LETTER' scrolls into the center of the frame over a blurred background.
hook.text_overlay: APOLOGY LETTER WE APOLOGIZE FOR THE DELAYED REWARDS! UP TO 200 BILLION FREE COINS

scene_flow: An 'Apology Letter' scrolls down from the top of the screen to the center.
The letter reveals a message apologizing for delayed rewards to the player.
A massive reward of 'UP TO 200 BILLION FREE COINS' is displayed in large, bold text.
The final frame holds on the offer with game characters and a prominent 'CLAIM NOW' button.
on_screen_text: HUFF N' MORE PUFF MONEY MANSION
WE APOLOGIZE FOR THE DELAYED REWARDS!
audience_proxy: Adult social casino players who respond to high-value currency offers and formal-looking 'official' announcements.
